Meta.title: NemoDrop
Meta.description: Share files or text quickly without signing in.

Home.heroDescription: Share files or text quickly without signing in.
Home.migrationNotice: The site address has changed to {host}.

Send.description: Switch between file sharing and text sharing as needed.
Send.uploadTooLarge: Total upload size must be {maxSize} or less.
Send.termsRequired: Please agree to the terms and privacy policy before uploading.

Receive.title: Open share
Receive.description: Enter a 6-digit share code to download files or copy text.

UploadZone.title: Drop files here or click to choose.
UploadZone.description: You can add multiple files up to {maxSize} total.

FileList.expiryDescription: Expires {duration} after upload and is deleted during scheduled cleanup

TextUpload.title: Share text
TextUpload.description: Saved as plain text. You can upload up to {maxSize}.
TextUpload.contentPlaceholder: Paste or type the text you want to share.
TextUpload.expiryDescription: Expires {duration} after upload and is deleted during scheduled cleanup

LegalConsent.agreement: I agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy> before uploading.

sections.title: 1. Service use
body: NemoDrop is a temporary file and text sharing service that can be used without signing in.
Uploaded files and shared text are provided through a share code or link until they expire.

sections.title: 2. User responsibility
body: You are responsible for the content you upload or share.
Do not upload illegal content, malware, spam, content that infringes rights, or files that you are not allowed to share.

sections.title: 3. Storage and deletion
body: Shared content becomes inaccessible after the expiration time selected during upload and is deleted during scheduled cleanup.
NemoDrop may delete uploaded content earlier when required for security, abuse prevention, maintenance, or legal compliance.

sections.title: 4. Availability
body: NemoDrop is provided as available. Temporary interruption, download failure, or data loss may occur due to network issues, server errors, maintenance, or external services.
Keep your own backup of important files before uploading.

sections.title: 1. Personal data we process
body: NemoDrop may process uploaded files, shared text, file names, file sizes, share codes, expiration times, IP addresses, browser information, request logs, and error logs.
Uploaded content may contain personal data depending on what you choose to share.

sections.title: 2. Purpose of processing
body: We use this data to provide upload, text sharing, download, QR code, expiration, security, abuse prevention, and service operation features.
Request and error logs are used to diagnose failures, protect the service, and respond to misuse.

sections.title: 3. Retention
body: Uploaded content is retained until the selected expiration time, becomes inaccessible after expiration, and is deleted during scheduled cleanup.
Operational logs may be kept for the minimum period needed for security, troubleshooting, and legal compliance.

sections.title: 4. Third parties and contact
body: Infrastructure, hosting, storage, analytics, or notification providers may process data only as needed to operate NemoDrop.
For deletion or privacy requests, contact the service operator through the contact channel provided by NemoDrop.

ShareResult.instruction: Send the code or link below to the recipient.
ShareResult.qrInstruction: Open with QR code or link

History.title: Previous uploads
History.description: Only uploads from this browser are shown.

Download.expiredDescription: Shared content is no longer accessible after expiration and is deleted during scheduled cleanup.

NotFound.codeDescription: The share code you entered is invalid, or the files may have already expired and been deleted.
NotFound.securityNote: For security, NemoDrop blocks access to expired shared files and permanently deletes them during scheduled cleanup.
NotFound.pageDescription: The requested page could not be found. Check the address and try again.
